---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or request a new capsule or platform target
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Request

Describe the feature you want.

## Why it matters

Describe the user or workflow problem this would solve.

## Scope

Examples:

- New bridge: Discord / Lark / Feishu
- New platform: Intel macOS / Windows / Linux
- Better install flow
- Better diagnostics or receipts

## Additional context

Add any screenshots, examples, or links here.
